name: Banana Date Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour, 3/4 teaspoon baking soda and spices into a large mixing bowl.
3. In a medium bowl, mix honey, maple syrup, vanilla and pureed banana. Stir into the flour mixture just until blended.
4. In a blender, process boiling water, dates and remaining baking soda until dates are pureed. Stir into the flour mixture.
5. Beat eggs until foamy and gently fold into batter. Do not overmix.
6. Spoon batter into 2 non-stick 9-inch round baking pans.
7. Bake at 360°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until cake tests done in center.
8. Serves 16
9. Nutrition Info per serving: Calories...228, Fat............0.5, Cholesterol..., Sodium...131mg.
